title: Old Republic era
content:
{{Top|real|old}} [[File:Era-old.png|right]] {{Otheruses|the Old Republic}} The '''Old Republic Era''', also referred to as the '''Sith era''', takes place from [[25,053 BBY]] (the founding of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]), until [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]] (the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan]] and the end of the [[New Sith Wars]]).{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?messageID=14866609#14882262|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-05-26|time=12:30 PM}} ===[[8000 BBY]] / [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]=== *{{StoryCite|story=Tilotny Throws a Shape|book=The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 154|bformatted=''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 154}} ===[[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]]=== [[File:CoruscantGreatHyperspaceWar-JediVsSith.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]] took place in [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]].]] *''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Golden Age of the Sith]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Fall of the Sith Empire]]'' *''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Precipice]]'' *''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Skyborn]]'' ===[[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]] / [[41 ABY]]=== *''[[Crosscurrent]]'' {{C|Past Sections only}} ===[[4985 BBY]]=== *''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Paragon]]'' ===[[4975 BBY]]=== *''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Savior]]'' ===[[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]]=== {{Quote|You want darkness, Oron Kira? I'll show you darkness!|Queen Amanoa, to Beast Lord Oron Kira|audio=Amanoa1-TOTJ.flac|[[Tales of the Jedi (audio)|''Tales of the Jedi'' (audio)]]}} *{{WEGCite|book=Star Wars Adventure Journal 11|story=The Most Dangerous Foe}} (bookend story takes place in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]) *{{WEGCite|book=Tales of the Jedi Companion|story=A Tale from the Dark Side}} *''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — Ulic Qel-Droma and the Beast Wars of Onderon]]'' *''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'': Queen Amanoa *''[[Light and Shadow]]'' ===c. [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]]=== *{{GalaxyCite|13|Jedi Protector}} *{{WEGCite|book=Tales of the Jedi Companion|story=The Muza Disappearances}} *{{WEGCite|book=Tales of the Jedi Companion|story=Evil Arisen}} ===[[3999 BBY]]=== {{Quote|Your destiny awaits, Nomi Sunrider.''"
"''I…I'm not sure I want it. I never wanted to ''be'' a warrior. I never wanted to play a part in any galactic battles!''"
"''A Jedi does not seek out battles, but neither does she turn her back on battle, when it finds her.|Thon and Nomi Sunrider|audio=NomiThon.flac|}} *''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Saga of Nomi Sunrider]]'' *{{WEGCite|book=Tales of the Jedi Companion|story=Ruins of Kabus-Dabeh}} ===[[3998 BBY]]=== {{Quote|The Jedi have not won today. As you will one day learn, the Jedi have lost!|Freedon Nadd, to Arca Jeth|audio=Nadd2-TotJ.flac|[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]]}} *[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Freedon Nadd Uprising|''Tales of the Jedi: The Freedon Nadd Uprising'']] ===[[3997 BBY]]=== {{Quote|The Dark Lords of the Sith have risen again. Together, we will bring down the galaxy!|Exar Kun to Ulic Qel-Droma|audio=TogetherWeWillBringDownTheGalaxy.flac|}} *''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi - Dark Lords of the Sith]]'' ===[[3996 BBY]]=== *''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Sith War]]' ===[[3993 BBY]]=== *{{Tales|23|Shadows and Light}} ===[[3986 BBY]]=== *''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi - Redemption]]'' ===[[3964 BBY]]=== *[[Knights of the Old Republic 0|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 0]] *"[[The Taris Holofeed: Prime Edition]]" *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Commencement]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Flashpoint]]'' ===[[3963 BBY]]=== *[[Knights of the Old Republic 10|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 10]] *[[Knights of the Old Republic 9|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 9]] *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Reunion]]'' *{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/fiction/f20080409/index.html|text="Labor Pains"|int=Labor Pains|newhost=Suvudu|simple=1}} *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Days of Fear]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Nights of Anger]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Daze of Hate]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Knights of Suffering]]'' *{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/interference20090929.html|text="Interference"|int=Interference|newhost=Suvudu|simple=1}} *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Vector]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Exalted]]'' *[[Knights of the Old Republic 31|''Knights of the Old Republic: Turnabout'']] *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Vindication]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prophet Motive]]'' *[[Knights of the Old Republic 38|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 38]] *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Dueling Ambitions]]'' *'''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: The Reaping]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Destroyer]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Demon]]'' ===[[3962 BBY]]=== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: War]]'' ===[[3960 BBY]]=== *''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Purgatory]]'' *''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Sentinel]]'' ===c. [[3959 BBY]]=== *{{WizardsCite|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/iridonian|text=Iridonian Darkness|int=Iridonian Darkness|simple=1}} *{{WizardsCite|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/Czerka431|text=Czerka 431|int=Czerka 431 (scenario)|simple=1}} *{{WizardsCite|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/PermanentDemotion|text=Permanent Demotion|int=Permanent Demotion|simple=1}} ===[[3957 BBY]]=== *''[[Knights of the Old Republic: Opportunities]]'' ===[[3956 BBY]]=== {{Quote|You will have gone from being the Sith Lord himself, to the savior of our galaxy.|[[Bastila Shan]]|audio=SithToSavior2.flac|''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''}} *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' ===[[3954 BBY]]=== *''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]'' ===[[3951 BBY]]=== {{Quote|Yes, always. From the moment you awoke, I have used you. I have used you so that you might become strong, stronger than I. I used you to keep the Lords of the Sith from condemning the galaxy to death with their power unchecked. I used you to lure them to Telos, where they could be, at last, fought and killed. I used you to reveal Atris' corruption, so that her teachings could be ended before they began. I used you to gather the Jedi so they could be destroyed. And I used you to make those who wounded me reveal themselves, so they could be killed by the Republic.|Kreia admits her manipulations|audio=FromTheMomentYouAwoke.flac|''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''}} *{{Tales|24|Unseen, Unheard}} *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' ===[[3950 BBY]]=== *''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]'' {{C|Chapter 17-29}} ===[[3681 BBY]]=== {{Quote|After a thousand years… Korriban is ours again!|[[Darth Malgus]]|audio=KorribanIsOursAgain-TOR.flac|[[Return (cinematic trailer)|''Return'']]}} *{{TORweb|url=info/media/trailers/return|text="Return"|int=Return (cinematic trailer)}} ===[[3678 BBY]]=== *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Blood of the Empire]]'' ===[[3667 BBY]]=== {{Quote|For centuries, Alderaan stood as a beacon of hope in the Republic. But the Empire came, and with one savage strike, brought Alderaan to her knees. Now, time is running out as few are left to face the enemy. For those that remain, there is but one choice. We must fight—to victory, or death—for the Republic! […] While the sacrifices are heavy, we fight knowing that a single spark of courage can ignite the fires of hope, and restore peace across the galaxy.|Jace Malcom|audio=HopeMonologue-TORHope.flac|[[Hope (cinematic trailer)|''Hope'']]}} *{{TORweb|url=info/media/trailers/hope-cinematic-trailer|text="Hope"|int=Hope (cinematic trailer)}} *{{InsiderCite|124|The Old Republic: The Third Lesson}} ===[[3660 BBY]]=== *''[[The Old Republic: Smuggler's Vanguard]]'' ===[[3658 BBY]]=== *{{TORweb|url=info/news/blog/20150306|text="The Final Trial"|int=The Final Trial}} ===[[3653 BBY]]=== {{Quote|Our time has come. For 300 years, we prepared. We grew stronger. While you rested in your cradle of power, believing your people were ''safe''... and ''protected''. You were trusted to ''lead'' the Republic—but you were deceived, as our powers of the dark side have blinded you. You assumed no force could challenge you...and now...''finally''...we have returned. [...] You were deceived. And now, your Republic shall fall|[[Darth Malgus]] during the invasion of the Jedi Temple|audio=InvasionOfTheJediTemple.flac|''[[Deceived]]''}}
